name: Production deployments blocked Friday 18:00 – Monday 06:00 UTC
description: Production deployments are denied during the weekend change freeze window (Friday 18:00 UTC through Monday 06:00 UTC). Emergency deployments require an explicit break-glass override with a logged justification.

policy.rationale: Weekend deploys reduce incidents because support capacity is lower and rollback windows are longer. The break-glass exception preserves the ability to ship critical fixes.
